abstract:
Scholars need to keep up with an exponentially increasing flood of scientific papers. To aid this challenge, we introduce
            Scim
            , a novel intelligent interface that helps scholars skim papers to rapidly review and gain a cursory understanding of its contents.
            Scim
            supports the skimming process by highlighting salient content within a paper, directing a scholar’s attention. These automatically-extracted highlights are faceted by content type, evenly-distributed across a paper, and have a density configurable by scholars. We evaluate
            Scim
            with an in-lab usability study and a longitudinal diary study, revealing how its highlights facilitate the more efficient construction of a conceptualization of a paper. Finally, we describe the process of scaling highlights from their conception within
            Scim
            , a research prototype, to production on over 521,000 papers within the Semantic Reader, a publicly-available augmented reading interface for scientific papers. We conclude by discussing design considerations and tensions for the design of future skimming tools with augmented intelligence.

ur.ai_reason: Augmented Intelligence系统+可用性研究和日记研究评估
ur.tldr: 针对科研人员难以应对论文爆炸式增长的挑战，研究团队开发了Scim智能阅读界面，通过可定制的分面高亮功能引导用户快速浏览论文内容，高亮按内容类型分类、均匀分布且密度可调。两项实验（可用性实验室研究和纵向日志研究）表明该功能显著提升了用户构建论文概念理解的效率，并已从研究原型扩展至Semantic Reader平台，覆盖超过52万篇论文，为增强型阅读工具的设计提供了实践参考。

title: Accelerating Scientific Paper Skimming with Augmented Intelligence Through Customizable Faceted Highlights
title_zh: 利用可定制分面高亮通过增强智能加速科学论文略读
